search_ph: Search for a course, module, professor...
about_sub: Qrayti.ma is a free student platform centralizing academic resources from the Faculty of Sciences Dhar El Mahraz — Fes.
about_who_body: We are FSDM students who wanted to create a centralized space to facilitate access to academic resources. Qrayti.ma is a community-driven, free, and open-source project.
cta_sub: Help your classmates by contributing your courses, TDs, or exams.
ai_greeting: Hello! I am the Qrayti Assistant. How can I help you today?
contact_p1: Have a question, suggestion, or document to share? Feel free to contact us.
browse_desc_main: Select your semester to start exploring.
